@startuml
title UML Diagram: Class DimensionComponent in Context

' Hints box
note left of DataStructureComponent
  Hints
  - Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.
  - Click on a name to go to the corresponding page.
  - The arrows of the inheritance tree are colored.
end note

' Main class: DataStructureComponent
class DataStructureComponent {
  identifier : Identifier
  semantic : PairedControlledVocabularyEntry
  specialization : SpecializationRole
}

' Subclass: DimensionComponent
class DimensionComponent {
  categoricalAdditivity : Boolean
}

' Associations from DataStructureComponent
DataStructureComponent --> DataDescription::DataStructure : has
DataStructureComponent --> DataDescription::DataPoint : correspondsTo
DataStructureComponent --> Conceptual::RepresentedVariable : isDefinedBy

' Inheritance relationship (colored arrow)
DimensionComponent --|> DataStructureComponent : (inherited)

' Associations from DimensionComponent
DimensionComponent --> KeyValue::MainKeyMember : isBasedOn
DimensionComponent --> Dimensional::DimensionalKeyMember : isBasedOn
DimensionComponent --> Representations::ValueDomain : isStructuredBy

' Footer note
note bottom
  DDI Cross Domain Integration (DDI-CDI) 1.0 – Components::DimensionComponent
end note

@enduml
